creator: support@spectrum.ru
text:
Hello.

I have similar problem with build multimedia/vlc port.

=46reeBSD 8.3 STABLE amd64
gmake-3.82_1
libtool-2.4.2

PORTNAME=3Dvlc
DISTVERSION=3D2.0.4
PORTEPOCH=3D3

Port build with options:
